author: Andrew Mouldon
name: Hierarchical Shared Attention — Multi-Level Head Sharing
blurb: HSA decomposes attention head features into shared, group-shared, and head-specific components, unifying MQA, GQA, and MHA-style sharing within one projection. Directly builds on the initial naive baseline and is trained for a fixed 10k steps. Improves fixed-step BPB through reinvesting savings into MLP, while staying within the same size budget.
